description: Add cross-session handoff doc format to RPI workflow (merged #8/#2). Define lightweight handoff format (timestamp, accomplishments, unfinished work, open questions, file paths) as an optional step between 'verify and loop' and session end.
hypothesis: Handoff docs will reduce context-rebuilding time in follow-up sessions, measurable by fewer codebase exploration steps in subsequent RPI rounds

description: Add retrospective appendix to pr-prep workflow (#9). Append 3-4 structured reflection questions (plan accuracy, skipped steps, time vs. estimate, what to change) to the end of pr-prep.md.
hypothesis: Retrospective questions will surface at least 1 actionable process improvement within 3 rounds of use

description: Create lightweight decision log (#15). Add docs/decisions/log.md with table format and clear scope boundary (one-line decisions that don't warrant a full DD record). Add a cross-reference from the DD workflow.
hypothesis: The lightweight log will capture at least 3 decisions that would otherwise go unrecorded in the next 3 rounds

description: Build self-evaluation skill (#3). Write a skill that reads docs/evaluation-rubric.md at runtime and applies automatable dimensions (testability, trigger clarity, overlap, coverage) to a target skill/workflow, flagging human-judgment dimensions for manual review. Validate by running on 2-3 existing skills.
hypothesis: Self-eval gate will reject at least 1 low-quality skill/workflow change within 3 rounds, preventing a regression from being merged

description: Add research doc freshness tracking (#14). Define a 'last verified' field for research and onboarding doc templates, and document a staleness heuristic (git log --since on relevant file paths). Requires spike-level design of the heuristic before implementation.
hypothesis: Freshness tracking will flag at least 1 stale doc that would otherwise mislead a session within 3 rounds
